guidance: Restrict mail relay to authenticated users. Set mynetworks to trusted IP ranges only. Require SASL authentication for relaying.
Disable VRFY and EXPN commands. Configure identical responses for valid and invalid RCPT TO addresses.
Implement SPF records to restrict authorized senders. Configure DKIM signing. Enforce DMARC policy (p=reject). Configure the server to reject spoofed sender addresses.
related_findings: Spoofed MAIL FROM accepted on port 25
Spoofed MAIL FROM accepted on port 25

guidance: Suppress server version information from banners. Set smtpd_banner to a generic string.
